title: analytics — authorization policies
description: Four policies matching the four entities. Read-only entities (event, delivery) refuse create/update/delete at the policy level; write operations for providers + identities scope-check by tenant + guard.

abilities.scope: tenant member with analytics.events.viewAny OR platform_admin
event.tenant_id === auth.tenant_id AND analytics.events.view OR platform_admin
REFUSED. Events only enter via the listener path (AnalyticsEventCapturer).
REFUSED. Events are immutable.
REFUSED. Events are hard-purged at retention boundary only.
tenant member with analytics.deliveries.viewAny OR platform_admin
delivery.tenant_id === auth.tenant_id AND analytics.deliveries.view OR platform_admin
requires ?include=raw_payload query param + auth.roles.includes('super_admin')
abilities.description: Ability gate for revealing request_payload + response bodies (may contain property values that survived PII scanning).

abilities.scope: REFUSED. Deliveries only created by DispatchAnalyticsEventJob.
REFUSED. Only the dispatch/retry pipeline may mutate.
REFUSED. Hard-purged at retention boundary.
tenant member OR platform_admin
config.tenant_id === auth.tenant_id
tenant admin/owner AND tenant has analytics_provider_slot entitlement remaining AND (provider IN baseline OR tenant has analytics_advanced_providers)
config.tenant_id === auth.tenant_id; refuse changes to provider column (immutable)
tenant owner (delete is a serious action — releases the provider slot + drains batch buffer)
tenant admin/owner; rate-limited to 30 tests/hour to avoid provider-side test-load abuse
tenant owner OR platform_admin — manual reset of an open circuit breaker; use with care
tenant member with viewAny OR platform_admin
identity.tenant_id === auth.tenant_id
tenant owner AND tenant has analytics_identity_merge entitlement (Enterprise-only)
tenant admin/owner. Server-side identify — the identified subject must exist in tenant's User table.
tenant owner AND explicit subject request (typically GDPR right-to-erasure cascade)
REFUSED. Retention runner is the only deletion path (soft-delete + eventual hard-purge).
